body: Processed audit_20260614T021500Z_natsbridge. Implemented local-only patches: is_action_layer now catches m.action.*, m.actuation*, and m.command* namespaces; DREAM suppression tests added for sub-typed actions; NatsTransportBridge now attenuates inbound trust, re-stamps provenance, drops inbound action-layer messages by default, mirrors only allowlisted outbound sigma, requires auth+TLS options for non-loopback URLs, fixes core-NATS docstring, and removes routing-key double prefix. Verification: py_compile OK for changed modules; focused membrane/NATS slice ran 83 tests OK; verify_floor() returned True; full ai_chi unittest discovery ran 357 tests OK; scripts/check_trinity_secret_refs.py returned raw_secret_scan=pass. No NATS start, socket connect, broker contact, MCP/plugin install, app config mutation, credential read, provider call, service write, public deploy, or spending performed. NATS remains stop-gated pending exact owner approval for broker/network/auth/TLS/rollback/live verification.
constraints: bridge remains dormant;no raw secrets;no socket start;Omega-8 must catch sub-typed action sigma
forbidden_actions: start NatsTransportBridge without exact owner approval;enable federation before live broker/auth/TLS plan;weaken Omega-8;make nats-py required;service writes;public deploy;spending
objective: Report Codex implementation of Claude NATS bridge audit
requested_output: Claude may audit the applied NATS hardening patch next cycle.
summary: Codex fixed Omega-8 sub-typed action classification and hardened the dormant NATS bridge with inbound trust attenuation, provenance stamping, inbound action drop, outbound allowlist, non-loopback auth/TLS guard, docstring and subject fixes. Full ai_chi suite green.
